messages:
{"parts":[{"tool_name":"list_app_tools","content":"Accounts:
- (vrijen@substrate.run): vrijen@substrate.run
- (attawar.v@gmail.com): attawar.v@gmail.com
- (vrijen@mycareerspan.com): vrijen@mycareerspan.com

When calling use_app_* tools, include `email` set to the email address shown.

- google_drive-create-file-from-template: Create a new Google Docs file from a template. Optionally include placeholders in the template document that will get replaced from this action. [See documentation](https://www.npmjs.com/package/google-docs-mustaches)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	templateId: Select the template document you'd like to use as the template, or use a custom expression to reference a document ID from a previous step. Template documents should contain placeholders in the format `{{xyz}}`.
	destinationDrive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	folderId: Select the folder of the newly created Google Doc and/or PDF, or use a custom expression to reference a folder ID from a previous step.
	name: Name of the file you want to create (eg. `myFile` will create a Google Doc called `myFile` and a pdf called `myFile.pdf`)
	mode: Specify if you want to create a Google Doc, PDF or both.
	replaceValues: Replace text placeholders in the document. Use the format `{{xyz}}` in the document but exclude the curly braces in the key. (eg. `{{myPlaceholder}}` in the document will be replaced by the value of the key `myPlaceholder` in the action.
- google_drive-upload-file: Upload a file to Google Drive. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/manage-uploads) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	parentId: The folder you want to upload the file to. If not specified, the file will be placed directly in the drive's top-level folder.
	filePath: Provide either a file URL or a path to a file in the /tmp directory (for example, /tmp/myFile.pdf).
	name: The name of the new file (e.g. `/myFile.csv`). By default, the name is the same as the source file's.
	mimeType: The file's MIME type (e.g., `image/jpeg`). Google Drive will attempt to automatically detect an appropriate value from uploaded content if no value is provided.
	uploadType: The type of upload request to the /upload URI. Required if you are uploading data, but not if are creating a metadata-only file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/reference/rest/v2/files/update#path-parameters) for more information.
	fileId: ID of the file to replace. Leave it empty to upload a new file.
	metadata: Additional metadata to supply in the upload. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/files) for information on available fields. Values will be parsed as JSON where applicable. Example: `{ "description": "my file description" }`
	syncDir: 
- google_drive-update-shared-drive: Update an existing shared drive. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/drives/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Select a [shared drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) to update
	useDomainAdminAccess: Issue the request as a domain administrator
	themeId: The theme from which the background image and color will be set. Cannot be set if `Color` or `Background Image Link` are used.
	backgroundImageLink: A link to the new background image for the shared drive. Cannot be set if `Theme ID` is used (it already sets the background image).
	colorRgb: The new color of this shared drive as an RGB hex string. Cannot be set if `Theme ID` is used (it already sets the color).
	restrictions: A set of restrictions that apply to this shared drive or items inside this shared drive. See `restrictions` in the [Drive resource representation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/drives#resource-representations).
- google_drive-update-reply: Update a reply on a specific comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/replies/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	replyId: The reply to get info for. You can select a reply or use a reply ID from a previous step.
	action: The action the reply performed to the parent comment.
	content: The plain text content of the reply.
- google_drive-update-file: Update a file's metadata and/or content. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to update
	filePath: The file content to upload. Provide either a file URL or a path to a file in the `/tmp` directory (for example, `/tmp/myFile.txt`)
	name: The new name of the file
	mimeType: The file's MIME type (e.g., `image/jpeg`). The value cannot be changed unless a new revision is uploaded.
	addParents: A list of parent folder IDs to add
	removeParents: A list of parent folder IDs to remove
	keepRevisionForever: Whether to set the 'keepForever' field in the new head revision. This is only applicable to files with binary content in Google Drive. Only 200 revisions for the file can be kept forever. If the limit is reached, try deleting pinned revisions.
	ocrLanguage: A language hint for OCR processing during image import (ISO 639-1 code)
	useContentAsIndexableText: Whether to use the uploaded content as indexable text
	advanced: Any additional parameters to pass in the request. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/update#request-body) for all available parameters.
	syncDir: 
- google_drive-update-comment: Update the content of a specific comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	content: The new content of the comment.
- google_drive-search-shared-drives: Search for shared drives with query options. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-shareddrives) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	q: The [shared drives](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) search query. See [query terms](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/ref-search-terms#drive_properties) for a list of shard drive-specific query terms.
	useDomainAdminAccess: Issue the request as a domain administrator
- google_drive-resolve-comment: Mark a comment as resolved. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/update)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file containing the comment to resolve.
	commentId: The ID of the comment to resolve.
- google_drive-resolve-access-proposal: Accept or deny a request for access to a file or folder in Google Drive. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/accessproposals/resolve)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileOrFolderId: The file or folder in the drive
	accessProposalId: The identifier of an access proposal (when a user requests access to a file/folder)
	action: The action to take on the AccessProposal
	roles: The roles to allow. Note: This field is required for the `ACCEPT` action.
	sendNotification: Whether to send an email to the requester when the AccessProposal is denied or accepted
- google_drive-reply-to-comment: Add a reply to an existing comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/replies/create)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file containing the comment to reply to.
	commentId: The ID of the comment to reply to.
	content: The text content of the reply to add
- google_drive-move-file: Move a file from one folder to another. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to move
	folderId: The folder you want to move the file to
- google_drive-move-file-to-trash: Move a file or folder to trash. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/update) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	infoAlert: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file or folder to move to trash
- google_drive-list-replies: List replies to a specific comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/replies/list) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	includeDeleted: Whether to include deleted replies.
- google_drive-list-files: List files from a specific folder. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/list) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	folderId: The ID of the parent folder which contains the file. If not specified, it will list files from the drive's top-level folder.
	fields: The fields you want included in the response [(see the documentation for available fields)](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/files). If not specified, the response includes a default set of fields specific to this method. For development you can use the special value `*` to return all fields, but you'll achieve greater performance by only selecting the fields you need.

**eg:** `files(id,mimeType,name,webContentLink,webViewLink)`
	filterText: Filter by file name that contains a specific text
	trashed: If `true`, list **only** trashed files. If `false`, list **only** non-trashed files. Keep it empty to include both.
- google_drive-list-comments: List all comments on a file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/list)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to list comments for.
- google_drive-list-access-proposals: List access proposals for a file or folder. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/accessproposals/list)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileOrFolderId: The file or folder in the drive
	maxResults: The maximum number of results to return
- google_drive-get-shared-drive: Get metadata for one or all shared drives. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/drives/get) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) or leave blank to retrieve all available shared drives.
	useDomainAdminAccess: Issue the request as a domain administrator
- google_drive-get-reply: Get reply by ID on a specific comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/replies/get) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	replyId: The reply to get info for. You can select a reply or use a reply ID from a previous step.
- google_drive-get-folder-id-for-path: Retrieve a folderId for a path. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-files) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	path: The path to the folder (e.g., `myFolder/mySubFolder1/mySubFolder2`)
- google_drive-get-file-by-id: Get info on a specific file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/files/get) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	fields: Customize the fields to obtain for the file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/files) for more information.
- google_drive-get-current-user: Retrieve Google Drive account metadata for the authenticated user via `about.get`, including display name, email, permission ID, and storage quota. Useful when flows or agents need to confirm the active Google identity or understand available storage. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/about/get).
Args:
	googleDrive: 
- google_drive-get-comment: Get comment by ID on a specific file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/get) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	includeDeleted: Whether to include deleted comments.
- google_drive-find-spreadsheets: Search for a specific spreadsheet by name. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-files) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	folderId: The ID of the parent folder which contains the file. If not specified, it will list files from the drive's top-level folder.
	queryAlert: 
	nameSearchTerm: Search for a file by name (equivalent to the query `name contains [value]`).
	searchQuery: Search for a file with a query. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/guides/ref-search-terms) for more information. If specified, `Search Name` and `Parent Folder` will be ignored.
- google_drive-find-forms: List Google Form documents or search for a Form by name. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-files) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	folderId: The ID of the parent folder which contains the file. If not specified, it will list files from the drive's top-level folder.
	queryAlert: 
	nameSearchTerm: Search for a file by name (equivalent to the query `name contains [value]`).
	searchQuery: Search for a file with a query. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/guides/ref-search-terms) for more information. If specified, `Search Name` and `Parent Folder` will be ignored.
- google_drive-find-folder: Search for a specific folder by name. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-files) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	nameSearchTerm: The name of the folder to search for
	includeTrashed: If set to true, returns all matches including items currently in the trash. Defaults to `false`.
- google_drive-find-file: Search for a specific file by name. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/search-files) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	nameSearchTerm: Search for a file by name (equivalent to the query `name contains [value]`).
	searchQuery: Search for a file with a query. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/guides/ref-search-terms) for more information. If specified, `Search Name` will be ignored.
- google_drive-download-file: Download a file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/manage-downloads) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to download
	filePath: The destination file name or path [in the `/tmp` directory](https://pipedream.com/docs/workflows/steps/code/nodejs/working-with-files/#the-tmp-directory) (e.g., `/tmp/myFile.csv`)
	mimeType: The format to which to convert the downloaded file if it is a [Google Workspace document](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/ref-export-formats)
	syncDir: 
	getBufferResponse: Whether to return the file content as a buffer instead of writing to a file path
- google_drive-delete-shared-drive: Delete a shared drive without any content. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/drives/delete) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Select a [shared drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) to delete.
- google_drive-delete-reply: Delete a reply on a specific comment. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/replies/delete) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileIdTip: 
	fileId: The file to obtain info for. You can select a file or use a file ID from a previous step.
	commentId: The comment to get info for. You can select a comment or use a comment ID from a previous step.
	replyId: The reply to get info for. You can select a reply or use a reply ID from a previous step.
- google_drive-delete-file: Permanently delete a file or folder without moving it to the trash. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/delete) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	infoAlert: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file or folder to delete
- google_drive-delete-comment: Delete a specific comment (Requires ownership or permissions). [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/delete)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file containing the comment to delete.
	commentId: The ID of the comment to delete.
- google_drive-create-shared-drive: Create a new shared drive. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/drives/create) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	name: The name of the new shared drive
- google_drive-create-folder: Create a new empty folder. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/create) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	parentId: Select a folder in which to place the new folder. If not specified, the folder will be placed directly in the drive's top-level folder.
	name: The name of the new folder
	createIfUnique: If the folder already exists, **do not** create. This option defaults to `false` for backwards compatibility and to be consistent with default Google Drive behavior.
- google_drive-create-file-from-text: Create a new file from plain text. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/create) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	parentId: The folder you want to add the file to. If not specified, the file will be placed directly in the drive's top-level folder.
	name: The name of the file you want to create (e.g., `myFile.txt`)
	content: Enter text to create the file with.
	mimeType: The [format](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/ref-export-formats) in which the text is presented
- google_drive-copy-file: Create a copy of the specified file. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/files/copy) for more information
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to copy
- google_drive-add-file-sharing-preference: Add a [sharing permission](https://support.google.com/drive/answer/7166529) to the sharing preferences of a file or folder and provide a sharing URL. [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/drive/api/v3/reference/permissions/create)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	useFileOrFolder: Whether to use a file or a folder for this action
	fileId: The file to share. You must specify either a file or a folder.
	folderId: The folder to share. You must specify either a file or a folder.
	type: The type of the grantee. Sharing with a domain is only valid for G Suite users.
- google_drive-add-comment: Add an unanchored comment to a Google Doc (general feedback, no text highlighting). [See the documentation](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/reference/rest/v3/comments/create)
Args:
	googleDrive: 
	drive: Defaults to `My Drive`. To select a [Shared Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9310351) instead, select it from this list.
	fileId: The file to add a comment to.
	content: The text content of the comment to add
	anchor: A region of the document represented as a JSON string. For details on defining anchor properties, refer to [Manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/v3/manage-comments).","tool_call_id":"toolu_01Q4iDmkfMGddATCFi1yriuz","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:04:35.669305Z","part_kind":"tool-return"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
